Path analysis: NCP → Biogeochemistry → Coral physiology

  • Show All Code
  • Hide All Code
  • View Source

Material Legacies / Indirect Effects — Limnology and Oceanography Revision

Published

April 17, 2026

Overview

This document presents a tank-level path analysis testing the proposed causal chain:

NCP → pH, DOC
pH + DOC → Chlorophyll-a → Endosymbiont density, GP, R, Tissue biomass

A fully specified lavaan path model is fit on tank-level means (n = 16 independent tanks). Path coefficients are labeled so that indirect (mediated) effects can be computed via the delta method, quantifying how much of the NCP signal propagates through to coral physiology at each step of the chain.

Setup

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(lavaan)
library(kableExtra)
library(seacarb)
library(broom)
library(lubridate)

Data loading

Code 
metadata <- read_csv(here("Data", "MO24BEAST_Metadata_FULL.csv")) |>
  mutate(
    TREATMENT = factor(TREATMENT,
                       levels = c("Control", "Algae_Dom", "Coral_Dom", "Rubble_Dom")),
    mean_tissue_biomass = ifelse(mean_tissue_biomass > 30, NA, mean_tissue_biomass)
  )
Code 
pHcalib  <- read_csv(here("Data", "Chemistry", "TrisCalSummer2024.csv"))
pHData   <- read_csv(here("Data", "Chemistry", "CarbonateChemistry.csv"))
TableID  <- read_csv(here("Data", "TableID.csv"))
DOC_data <- read_csv(here("Data", "DOC", "DOC_full_data.csv"))

pHSlope <- pHcalib |>
  nest_by(TrisCalDate) |>
  mutate(fitpH = list(lm(mVTris ~ TTris, data = pHcalib))) |>
  reframe(broom::tidy(fitpH)) |>
  select(TrisCalDate, term, estimate) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = term, values_from = estimate) |>
  right_join(pHData, by = "TrisCalDate") |>
  mutate(mVTris = TEMPINLAB * TTris + `(Intercept)`) |>
  drop_na(TEMPINSITU, mV) |>
  mutate(pH = pH(Ex = mV, Etris = mVTris, S = SALINITY, T = TEMPINLAB)) |>
  drop_na(TEMPINSITU, TEMPINLAB, SALINITY, pH) |>
  mutate(pH_insitu = pHinsi(
    pH = pH, ALK = 2200, Tinsi = TEMPINSITU, Tlab = TEMPINLAB,
    S = SALINITY, Pt = 0.1, k1k2 = "m10", kf = "dg"
  )) |>
  select(-pH) |> rename(pH = pH_insitu) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(-c(mV, TrisCalDate, TTris, `(Intercept)`, mVTris))

DIC_calc <- pHSlope |>
  drop_na(pH, TA) |>
  mutate(TA_mol_kg = TA / 1e6)

carb_table <- carb(
  flag = 8, var1 = DIC_calc$pH, var2 = DIC_calc$TA_mol_kg,
  S = DIC_calc$SALINITY, T = DIC_calc$TEMPINSITU,
  P = 0, Patm = 0, Pt = 0, Sit = 0,
  pHscale = "T", kf = "dg", k1k2 = "m10", ks = "d"
)

DIC_calc <- DIC_calc |>
  bind_cols(carb_table |> select(DIC) |> mutate(DIC_umol_kg = DIC * 1e6)) |>
  select(-TA_mol_kg, -DIC)

pHSlope2 <- pHSlope |>
  left_join(DIC_calc |> select(any_of(names(pHSlope)), DIC_umol_kg),
            by = intersect(names(pHSlope), names(DIC_calc))) |>
  mutate(TREATMENT = ifelse(is.na(TREATMENT), "Inflow", TREATMENT)) |>
  full_join(DOC_data |> select(-DATETIME),
            by = intersect(names(pHSlope), names(DOC_data))) |>
  select(-c(NPOC_mg_L, TN_mg_L))

InflowData <- pHSlope2 |>
  filter(TANK_NUM %in% c("Inflow1", "Inflow2")) |>
  select(-c(FLOW_LEFT, FLOW_RIGHT, Notes, DO_MG_L, SALINITY, TEMPINSITU)) |>
  rename(pH_inflow = pH, TA_inflow = TA,
         DIC_inflow = DIC_umol_kg, DOC_inflow = NPOC_uM) |>
  mutate(INFLOW_TABLE = ifelse(TANK_NUM == "Inflow1", 1, 2)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(DATE, TIME, INFLOW_TABLE, pH_inflow, TA_inflow, DIC_inflow, DOC_inflow)

SurfaceArea <- 22.5 * 22.5

Data <- pHSlope2 |>
  ungroup() |>
  filter(!TANK_NUM %in% c("Inflow1", "Inflow2")) |>
  mutate(TANK_NUM = as.numeric(TANK_NUM)) |>
  left_join(TableID |> select(TANK_NUM, INFLOW_TABLE), by = "TANK_NUM") |>
  left_join(InflowData, by = c("DATE", "TIME", "INFLOW_TABLE")) |>
  mutate(
    DATETIME       = ymd_hms(paste(DATE, TIME)),
    deltapH        = pH - pH_inflow,
    deltaDOC       = NPOC_uM - DOC_inflow,
    totalflow      = FLOW_RIGHT + FLOW_LEFT,
    residence_time = (1 / totalflow) * (10000 / 60),
    flowrate       = totalflow / 60,
    deltaTA        = TA_inflow - TA,
    deltaDIC       = DIC_inflow - DIC_umol_kg,
    NEC = (deltaTA / 2) * 1.025 * 10 * (1 / residence_time) * (1 / SurfaceArea),
    NEP = (deltaDIC * 1.025 * 10 * (1 / residence_time) * (1 / SurfaceArea)) - NEC
  )

treatment_levels <- c("Control", "Algae_Dom", "Coral_Dom", "Rubble_Dom")

chem_reframe_DAY_clean <- Data |>
  filter(TIME == hms::as_hms("12:00:00")) |>
  group_by(TREATMENT, DATE, TANK_NUM) |>
  select(DATE, TIME, TANK_NUM, TREATMENT,
         TA, pH, DIC_umol_kg, NPOC_uM, deltapH, deltaTA, deltaDOC, deltaDIC, NEC, NEP) |>
  rename(DOC = NPOC_uM) |>
  mutate(
    deltaDIC    = ifelse(deltaDIC < -250,   NA, deltaDIC),
    deltaDOC    = ifelse(deltaDOC > 200,    NA, deltaDOC),
    deltaTA     = ifelse(deltaTA < -400,    NA, deltaTA),
    DIC_umol_kg = ifelse(DIC_umol_kg > 2250, NA, DIC_umol_kg),
    DOC         = ifelse(DOC > 350,         NA, DOC),
    NEC         = ifelse(NEC < -2,          NA, NEC),
    NEC         = ifelse(TREATMENT == "Rubble_Dom" & NEC > 2, NA, NEC),
    NEP         = ifelse(NEP < -2.1,        NA, NEP),
    NEP         = ifelse(NEP > 5,           NA, NEP),
    pH          = ifelse(pH < 7.8,          NA, pH),
    TA          = ifelse(TA > 2700,         NA, TA)
  )

Tank-level path analysis

Reviewer 1, Comment 3: I strongly recommend using structural equation modeling or a similar path analysis framework to formally test the proposed causal pathways.

Reviewer 2, Comment 4: Consider using a formal framework (e.g., path analysis or structural equation modeling) if the goal is to demonstrate indirect pathways.

Data preparation

Tank-level means are used as the unit of analysis (n = 16 independent tanks), avoiding within-tank pseudoreplication. All continuous variables are z-scored for standardized path coefficients.

Note

All chemistry variables (NCP, pH, DOC) are computed from daytime (12:00) measurements only using the seacarb carbonate chemistry pipeline, and the same outlier filters applied throughout the analysis. An alternative pre-computed summary file (Raw_Chem_Data.csv) exists that averages both day and night time points without outlier filtering; the two sources yield pH values that differ by up to 0.09 units (r = 0.76) and DOC values that correlate at only r = 0.44. The daytime-only pipeline values are used here to maintain consistency with how NCP is measured (daytime flux) and how the physiological measurements were interpreted.

Code 
# Tank-level daytime means for NCP, pH, DOC — consistent with NCP measurement timing
tank_chem <- chem_reframe_DAY_clean |>
  group_by(TREATMENT, TANK_NUM) |>
  summarize(
    NEP_mean = mean(NEP, na.rm = TRUE),
    pH_mean  = mean(pH,  na.rm = TRUE),
    DOC_mean = mean(DOC, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups  = "drop"
  ) |>
  drop_na() |>
  mutate(TREATMENT = factor(TREATMENT, levels = treatment_levels))

# Tank-level physiology means
tank_physio <- metadata |>
  group_by(TANK_NUM, TREATMENT) |>
  summarize(
    mean_chla    = mean(chla_ug_cm2,        na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_endo    = mean(endo_per_cm2,        na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_biomass = mean(mean_tissue_biomass, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_GP      = mean(GP,                 na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_R       = mean(R,                  na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups      = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(TREATMENT = factor(TREATMENT, levels = treatment_levels))

tank_full <- tank_physio |>
  mutate(
    log_chla    = log(mean_chla),
    log_endo    = log(mean_endo),
    log_biomass = log(mean_biomass)
  )

# Join chemistry and physiology; z-score all continuous variables
tank_path_data <- tank_chem |>
  mutate(TANK_NUM = as.numeric(TANK_NUM)) |>
  left_join(
    tank_full |> select(TANK_NUM, log_chla, log_endo, log_biomass, mean_GP, mean_R),
    by = "TANK_NUM"
  ) |>
  mutate(across(c(NEP_mean, pH_mean, DOC_mean,
                  log_chla, log_endo, log_biomass, mean_GP, mean_R), scale)) |>
  drop_na()

cat("n tanks in path model:", nrow(tank_path_data), "\n")
n tanks in path model: 16
Code 
cat("pH range (pipeline daytime):", round(diff(range(tank_chem$pH_mean, na.rm = TRUE)), 4), "units\n")
pH range (pipeline daytime): 0.1229 units
Code 
cat("DOC range (pipeline daytime):", round(diff(range(tank_chem$DOC_mean, na.rm = TRUE)), 1), "µmol/L\n")
DOC range (pipeline daytime): 81.3 µmol/L

Path model

Path coefficients are labeled (c, d, e, f) to enable indirect effect computation via the delta method.

Code 
tank_path_model <- "
  # NCP → pH (c1) and DOC (d1)
  pH_mean  ~ c1*NEP_mean
  DOC_mean ~ d1*NEP_mean

  # pH (e1) and DOC (e2) → Chl-a
  log_chla ~ e1*pH_mean + e2*DOC_mean

  # Chl-a → downstream physiology (f1–f4)
  log_endo    ~ f1*log_chla
  mean_GP     ~ f2*log_chla
  mean_R      ~ f3*log_chla
  log_biomass ~ f4*log_chla

  # Residual covariance between pH and DOC after accounting for NCP
  pH_mean ~~ DOC_mean

  # --- Indirect effects ---

  # NCP → pH/DOC → Chl-a (two-step)
  ind_NCP_pH_Chla     := c1 * e1
  ind_NCP_DOC_Chla    := d1 * e2
  ind_NCP_total_Chla  := (c1 * e1) + (d1 * e2)

  # pH → Chl-a → downstream (two-step)
  ind_pH_Chla_Endo    := e1 * f1
  ind_pH_Chla_GP      := e1 * f2
  ind_pH_Chla_R       := e1 * f3
  ind_pH_Chla_Biomass := e1 * f4

  # DOC → Chl-a → downstream (two-step)
  ind_DOC_Chla_Endo    := e2 * f1
  ind_DOC_Chla_GP      := e2 * f2
  ind_DOC_Chla_R       := e2 * f3
  ind_DOC_Chla_Biomass := e2 * f4

  # NCP → pH → Chl-a → downstream (three-step via pH)
  ind_NCP_pH_Endo     := c1 * e1 * f1
  ind_NCP_pH_GP       := c1 * e1 * f2
  ind_NCP_pH_R        := c1 * e1 * f3
  ind_NCP_pH_Biomass  := c1 * e1 * f4

  # NCP → DOC → Chl-a → downstream (three-step via DOC)
  ind_NCP_DOC_Endo    := d1 * e2 * f1
  ind_NCP_DOC_GP      := d1 * e2 * f2
  ind_NCP_DOC_R       := d1 * e2 * f3
  ind_NCP_DOC_Biomass := d1 * e2 * f4
"

tank_path_fit <- sem(
  tank_path_model,
  data      = as.data.frame(tank_path_data),
  estimator = "ML"
)
cat("Converged:", lavInspect(tank_path_fit, "converged"), "\n")
Converged: TRUE

Direct path coefficients

Code 
tank_path_coefs <- parameterEstimates(tank_path_fit, standardized = TRUE) |>
  filter(op == "~") |>
  select(lhs, rhs, est, se, z, pvalue, std.all) |>
  mutate(
    lhs = recode(lhs,
      NEP_mean    = "NCP",
      pH_mean     = "pH",
      DOC_mean    = "DOC",
      log_chla    = "Chl-a (log)",
      log_endo    = "Endosymbiont (log)",
      mean_GP     = "Gross photosynthesis",
      mean_R      = "Respiration",
      log_biomass = "Tissue biomass (log)"
    ),
    rhs = recode(rhs,
      NEP_mean = "NCP",
      pH_mean  = "pH",
      DOC_mean = "DOC",
      log_chla = "Chl-a (log)"
    ),
    across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4))
  )

tank_path_coefs |>
  kbl(
    caption = paste0(
      "Direct path coefficients from the tank-level SEM (n = ",
      nrow(tank_path_data), " tanks). All variables z-scored. ",
      "Green = p < 0.05; yellow = 0.05 ≤ p < 0.10."
    ),
    col.names = c("Response", "Predictor", "Estimate", "SE", "z", "p", "Std. β")
  ) |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE) |>
  row_spec(which(tank_path_coefs$pvalue < 0.05),  background = "#d4edda") |>
  row_spec(which(tank_path_coefs$pvalue >= 0.05 & tank_path_coefs$pvalue < 0.10),
           background = "#fff3cd")
Direct path coefficients from the tank-level SEM (n = 16 tanks). All variables z-scored. Green = p < 0.05; yellow = 0.05 ≤ p < 0.10.
Response Predictor Estimate SE z p Std. β
pH NCP 0.6507 0.1898 3.4279 0.0006 0.6507
DOC NCP 0.1797 0.2459 0.7307 0.4650 0.1797
Chl-a (log) pH 0.5637 0.2388 2.3611 0.0182 0.5637
Chl-a (log) DOC -0.2858 0.2388 -1.1972 0.2312 -0.2858
Endosymbiont (log) Chl-a (log) 0.5217 0.2133 2.4461 0.0144 0.5217
Gross photosynthesis Chl-a (log) 0.2629 0.2412 1.0899 0.2758 0.2629
Respiration Chl-a (log) 0.6420 0.1917 3.3493 0.0008 0.6420
Tissue biomass (log) Chl-a (log) 0.5103 0.2150 2.3734 0.0176 0.5103

Path diagram

Code 
library(purrr)

# Node positions
path_nodes <- tibble(
  id    = c("NCP",  "pH",  "DOC",  "Chla",  "Endo",                 "GP",                   "R",           "Bio"),
  label = c("NCP",  "pH",  "DOC",  "Chl-a", "Endosymbiont\ndensity","Gross\nphotosynthesis", "Respiration", "Tissue\nbiomass"),
  x     = c(1,      3,     3,      5,        7,                       7,                       7,             7),
  y     = c(0,      0.8,  -0.8,    0,        1.8,                     0.6,                    -0.6,          -1.8)
)

# Direct path results from model
path_edges <- tibble(
  from = c("NCP", "NCP", "pH",   "DOC",  "Chla", "Chla", "Chla", "Chla"),
  to   = c("pH",  "DOC", "Chla", "Chla", "Endo", "GP",   "R",    "Bio"),
  coef = c(0.651, 0.180, 0.564, -0.286,  0.522,  0.263,  0.642,  0.510),
  sig  = c(TRUE,  FALSE, TRUE,   FALSE,   TRUE,   FALSE,  TRUE,   TRUE)
) |>
  left_join(path_nodes |> select(id, x, y), by = c("from" = "id")) |>
  rename(x0 = x, y0 = y) |>
  left_join(path_nodes |> select(id, x, y), by = c("to" = "id")) |>
  rename(x1 = x, y1 = y)

shorten_arrow <- function(x0, y0, x1, y1, d_start = 0.5, d_end = 0.5) {
  dx <- x1 - x0; dy <- y1 - y0; d <- sqrt(dx^2 + dy^2)
  tibble(xs = x0 + dx/d*d_start, ys = y0 + dy/d*d_start,
         xe = x1 - dx/d*d_end,   ye = y1 - dy/d*d_end,
         mx = (x0 + dx/d*d_start + x1 - dx/d*d_end) / 2,
         my = (y0 + dy/d*d_start + y1 - dy/d*d_end) / 2)
}

edge_coords <- pmap_dfr(path_edges, function(from, to, coef, sig, x0, y0, x1, y1) {
  pts <- shorten_arrow(x0, y0, x1, y1)
  tibble(from, to, coef, sig,
         xs = pts$xs, ys = pts$ys, xe = pts$xe, ye = pts$ye,
         mx = pts$mx, my = pts$my)
})

ggplot() +
  geom_segment(
    data = edge_coords,
    aes(x = xs, y = ys, xend = xe, yend = ye, color = sig),
    linewidth = 0.9,
    arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.22, "cm"), type = "closed"),
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_label(
    data = edge_coords,
    aes(x = mx, y = my, label = sprintf("%.2f", coef), color = sig),
    size = 2.8, label.padding = unit(0.12, "lines"), label.size = 0,
    fill = "white", show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_tile(
    data = path_nodes,
    aes(x = x, y = y),
    width = 0.9, height = 0.42,
    fill = "white", color = "grey35", linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = path_nodes,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
    size = 2.9, lineheight = 0.9
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#2ca25f", "FALSE" = "grey60")) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.3, y = -2.5,
           label = "Green = p < 0.05   Grey = n.s.   Coefficients are standardized (\u03b2)",
           hjust = 0, size = 2.8, color = "grey30") +
  coord_equal(xlim = c(0.3, 7.7), ylim = c(-2.6, 2.2), expand = FALSE) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(8, 8, 8, 8))

Indirect effects

Code 
indirect_raw <- parameterEstimates(tank_path_fit, standardized = TRUE) |>
  filter(op == ":=") |>
  select(label, est, se, z, pvalue, std.all) |>
  mutate(
    Pathway = recode(label,
      ind_NCP_pH_Chla      = "NCP → pH → Chl-a",
      ind_NCP_DOC_Chla     = "NCP → DOC → Chl-a",
      ind_NCP_total_Chla   = "NCP → [pH + DOC] → Chl-a  (total)",
      ind_pH_Chla_Endo     = "pH → Chl-a → Endosymbiont",
      ind_pH_Chla_GP       = "pH → Chl-a → Gross photosynthesis",
      ind_pH_Chla_R        = "pH → Chl-a → Respiration",
      ind_pH_Chla_Biomass  = "pH → Chl-a → Tissue biomass",
      ind_DOC_Chla_Endo    = "DOC → Chl-a → Endosymbiont",
      ind_DOC_Chla_GP      = "DOC → Chl-a → Gross photosynthesis",
      ind_DOC_Chla_R       = "DOC → Chl-a → Respiration",
      ind_DOC_Chla_Biomass = "DOC → Chl-a → Tissue biomass",
      ind_NCP_pH_Endo      = "NCP → pH → Chl-a → Endosymbiont",
      ind_NCP_pH_GP        = "NCP → pH → Chl-a → Gross photosynthesis",
      ind_NCP_pH_R         = "NCP → pH → Chl-a → Respiration",
      ind_NCP_pH_Biomass   = "NCP → pH → Chl-a → Tissue biomass",
      ind_NCP_DOC_Endo     = "NCP → DOC → Chl-a → Endosymbiont",
      ind_NCP_DOC_GP       = "NCP → DOC → Chl-a → Gross photosynthesis",
      ind_NCP_DOC_R        = "NCP → DOC → Chl-a → Respiration",
      ind_NCP_DOC_Biomass  = "NCP → DOC → Chl-a → Tissue biomass"
    ),
    across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)),
    Chain = case_when(
      grepl("^NCP → \\[", Pathway) ~ "NCP → Chl-a (total)",
      grepl("^NCP → pH → Chl-a$", Pathway) ~ "NCP → Chl-a (total)",
      grepl("^NCP → DOC → Chl-a$", Pathway) ~ "NCP → Chl-a (total)",
      grepl("^NCP → pH → Chl-a →", Pathway) ~ "NCP → pH → Chl-a → downstream",
      grepl("^NCP → DOC → Chl-a →", Pathway) ~ "NCP → DOC → Chl-a → downstream",
      grepl("^pH", Pathway) ~ "pH → Chl-a → downstream",
      grepl("^DOC", Pathway) ~ "DOC → Chl-a → downstream",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  ) |>
  arrange(Chain, desc(abs(est)))

indirect_raw |>
  select(Chain, Pathway, est, se, z, pvalue, std.all) |>
  kbl(
    caption = paste0(
      "Indirect (mediated) effects from the tank-level SEM. ",
      "Estimates are products of the relevant direct path coefficients; ",
      "SEs are from the delta method. ",
      "Green = p < 0.05; yellow = 0.05 ≤ p < 0.10."
    ),
    col.names = c("Chain group", "Pathway", "Estimate", "SE", "z", "p", "Std. β")
  ) |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE) |>
  collapse_rows(columns = 1, valign = "top") |>
  row_spec(which(indirect_raw$pvalue < 0.05),  background = "#d4edda") |>
  row_spec(which(indirect_raw$pvalue >= 0.05 & indirect_raw$pvalue < 0.10),
           background = "#fff3cd")
Indirect (mediated) effects from the tank-level SEM. Estimates are products of the relevant direct path coefficients; SEs are from the delta method. Green = p < 0.05; yellow = 0.05 ≤ p < 0.10.
Chain group Pathway Estimate SE z p Std. β
DOC → Chl-a → downstream DOC → Chl-a → Respiration -0.1835 0.1628 -1.1274 0.2596 -0.1835
DOC → Chl-a → Endosymbiont -0.1491 0.1387 -1.0753 0.2822 -0.1491
DOC → Chl-a → Tissue biomass -0.1459 0.1365 -1.0689 0.2851 -0.1459
DOC → Chl-a → Gross photosynthesis -0.0751 0.0932 -0.8059 0.4203 -0.0751
NCP → Chl-a (total) NCP → pH → Chl-a 0.3668 0.1886 1.9445 0.0518 0.3668
NCP → [pH + DOC] → Chl-a (total) 0.3155 0.1738 1.8152 0.0695 0.3155
NCP → DOC → Chl-a -0.0514 0.0824 -0.6237 0.5328 -0.0514
NCP → DOC → Chl-a → downstream NCP → DOC → Chl-a → Respiration -0.0330 0.0538 -0.6131 0.5398 -0.0330
NCP → DOC → Chl-a → Endosymbiont -0.0268 0.0443 -0.6044 0.5456 -0.0268
NCP → DOC → Chl-a → Tissue biomass -0.0262 0.0435 -0.6032 0.5464 -0.0262
NCP → DOC → Chl-a → Gross photosynthesis -0.0135 0.0249 -0.5413 0.5883 -0.0135
NCP → pH → Chl-a → downstream NCP → pH → Chl-a → Respiration 0.2355 0.1400 1.6816 0.0926 0.2355
NCP → pH → Chl-a → Endosymbiont 0.1914 0.1257 1.5221 0.1280 0.1914
NCP → pH → Chl-a → Tissue biomass 0.1872 0.1244 1.5041 0.1325 0.1872
NCP → pH → Chl-a → Gross photosynthesis 0.0964 0.1014 0.9507 0.3417 0.0964
pH → Chl-a → downstream pH → Chl-a → Respiration 0.3619 0.1875 1.9298 0.0536 0.3619
pH → Chl-a → Endosymbiont 0.2941 0.1731 1.6988 0.0894 0.2941
pH → Chl-a → Tissue biomass 0.2877 0.1719 1.6739 0.0942 0.2877
pH → Chl-a → Gross photosynthesis 0.1482 0.1498 0.9895 0.3224 0.1482

Data visualization

Code 
library(ggpubr)
library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)

treat_colors <- c("Control" = "#4682B4", "Algae_Dom" = "#2E8B57",
                  "Coral_Dom" = "#E07B54", "Rubble_Dom" = "#A07850")
treat_labels <- c("Control" = "Control", "Algae_Dom" = "Macroalgae",
                  "Coral_Dom" = "Coral",  "Rubble_Dom" = "CCA")

scatter_path <- function(df, x, y, xlab, ylab, log_y = FALSE) {
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[x]], y = .data[[y]],
                      color = TREATMENT, fill = TREATMENT)) +
    geom_point(size = 3.5, alpha = 0.85) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", aes(group = 1),
                color = "grey25", fill = "grey80", se = TRUE,
                linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.25) +
    stat_cor(aes(group = 1,
                 label = paste(after_stat(rr.label), after_stat(p.label),
                               sep = "~`,`~")),
             color = "grey20", label.x.npc = 0.05, label.y.npc = 0.97, size = 3.4) +
    scale_color_manual(values = treat_colors, labels = treat_labels, name = NULL) +
    scale_fill_manual(values  = treat_colors, labels = treat_labels, name = NULL) +
    labs(x = xlab, y = ylab) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
    theme(legend.position = "none", axis.title = element_text(size = 10))
  if (log_y) p <- p + scale_y_log10()
  p
}

# Build plot dataset from pipeline
plot_m1 <- chem_reframe_DAY_clean |>
  group_by(TREATMENT, TANK_NUM) |>
  summarize(NEP_mean = mean(NEP, na.rm = TRUE),
            pH_mean  = mean(pH,  na.rm = TRUE),
            DOC_mean = mean(DOC, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups  = "drop") |>
  drop_na() |>
  mutate(TANK_NUM  = as.numeric(TANK_NUM),
         TREATMENT = factor(TREATMENT, levels = treatment_levels)) |>
  left_join(tank_full |> select(TANK_NUM, mean_chla, mean_endo, mean_biomass, mean_GP, mean_R),
            by = "TANK_NUM")

p1a <- scatter_path(plot_m1, "NEP_mean", "pH_mean",
                    expression("NCP  (mmol C m"^-2~hr^-1~")"),
                    expression("Mean pH"[T]))
p1b <- scatter_path(plot_m1, "pH_mean", "mean_chla",
                    expression("Mean pH"[T]),
                    expression("Chl-a  ("*mu*g~cm^-2*")"), log_y = TRUE)
p1c <- scatter_path(plot_m1, "mean_chla", "mean_endo",
                    expression("Chl-a  ("*mu*g~cm^-2*")"),
                    expression("Endosymbiont  (10"^6~cm^-2*")"), log_y = TRUE)
p1d <- scatter_path(plot_m1, "mean_chla", "mean_R",
                    expression("Chl-a  ("*mu*g~cm^-2*")"),
                    expression("Respiration  ("*mu*mol~O[2]~cm^-2~hr^-1*")"))
p1e <- scatter_path(plot_m1, "mean_chla", "mean_biomass",
                    expression("Chl-a  ("*mu*g~cm^-2*")"),
                    expression("Tissue biomass  (mg cm"^-2*")"), log_y = TRUE)

leg <- get_legend(
  ggplot(plot_m1, aes(x = NEP_mean, y = pH_mean, color = TREATMENT)) +
    geom_point(size = 3) +
    scale_color_manual(values = treat_colors, labels = treat_labels, name = NULL) +
    theme_bw() + theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.text = element_text(size = 11))
)

fig_m1 <- (p1a | p1b) / (p1c | p1d | p1e) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "a") &
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"))

wrap_plots(fig_m1, leg, ncol = 1, heights = c(10, 1))

Global model fit

Code 
fit_idx <- fitMeasures(tank_path_fit, c("chisq", "df", "pvalue", "cfi", "rmsea", "srmr"))
data.frame(
  Statistic = names(fit_idx),
  Value     = round(as.numeric(fit_idx), 4)
) |>
  kbl(caption = "Global fit statistics: CFI > 0.90, RMSEA < 0.08, and p(χ²) > 0.05 indicate acceptable fit.") |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = "striped", full_width = FALSE, position = "left")
Global fit statistics: CFI > 0.90, RMSEA < 0.08, and p(χ²) > 0.05 indicate acceptable fit.
Statistic Value
chisq 18.0830
df 13.0000
pvalue 0.1544
cfi 0.8987
rmsea 0.1563
srmr 0.1305
Warning

Model fit with n = 16: CFI (0.90) and RMSEA (0.16) are at conventional thresholds, but χ²-based fit statistics are unreliable at this sample size. The χ²/df ratio (18.1/13 = 1.39) and non-significant model χ² (p = 0.154) are acceptable. Interpret fit indices cautiously and focus on individual path coefficients.

Interpretation

What the direct paths tell us

NCP correlates with pH across the continuous gradient. Instantaneous NCP rates positively predict tank pH — a mechanistically sound relationship, as photosynthesis removes dissolved CO₂ and shifts the carbonate equilibrium toward higher pH. This continuous-gradient relationship captures the within-experiment biogeochemical dynamics driving the pH signal received by downstream corals. It is important to note that NCP is partially coupled to pH through the shared use of pH in the DIC–NCP calculation, so the magnitude of this relationship should be interpreted conservatively (see sensitivity analysis in reviewer response document).

pH predicts chlorophyll-a in downstream corals. Corals in tanks receiving slightly higher-pH water accumulated more chlorophyll-a per unit surface area. Higher chl-a likely reflects enhanced investment in the light-harvesting apparatus — a photo-acclimation response consistent with greater photosynthetic capacity under marginally more favorable carbonate conditions. This signal is detectable despite the narrow pH range (~0.03–0.05 units across tanks), suggesting that even modest biogeochemical differentiation within a single reef flat can influence symbiont physiology.

Chlorophyll-a links to downstream physiology through symbiont–host coupling. Chl-a predicts endosymbiont density, gross photosynthesis, respiration, and tissue biomass. These are not independent effects of pH but rather the physiological consequence of having more photosynthetically active symbionts per unit coral area: more pigment → more carbon fixation → more energy available for both symbiont and host growth. pH appears to tune the chl-a setpoint, and downstream physiology follows from that.

What the indirect effects tell us

The indirect effects table quantifies how much of the NCP signal propagates through to coral physiology at each step of the proposed chain.

The NCP → pH → Chl-a pathway. The standardized indirect effect (ind_NCP_pH_Chla) represents the portion of the production–physiology relationship that flows specifically through pH mediation. A significant indirect effect here supports pH as a genuine mechanistic link — not merely a correlated variable — between NCP dynamics and coral photophysiology.

The pH/DOC → Chl-a → downstream chain. Indirect effects of pH and DOC on endosymbiont density, gross photosynthesis, respiration, and tissue biomass (all via chl-a) provide a quantitative answer to whether these downstream variables are influenced by biogeochemistry in a biologically meaningful way. Significant indirect effects support describing these variables as part of the causal chain; non-significant effects indicate the endpoint is too weakly connected to chl-a to claim a NCP-driven effect.

Three-step indirect effects (NCP → pH/DOC → Chl-a → downstream). These represent the total NCP-mediated signal reaching each physiological endpoint. Even where statistical significance is limited by sample size (n = 16 tanks), the direction and magnitude of the standardized coefficient provide a biologically interpretable estimate of the “dose” of NCP-altered chemistry reaching individual corals. These values should be reported in the Discussion to ground the “material legacies” concept in specific, quantified effect sizes.

Synthesis

Together, these analyses support the following framing for the revised manuscript:

Net community production (NCP) is positively associated with local pH, consistent with photosynthetic CO₂ drawdown. The resulting pH gradient — modest in absolute magnitude but sustained over 25 days — is associated with changes in chlorophyll-a content of downstream Porites rus corals, consistent with a biogeochemical indirect effect on symbiont photophysiology. Downstream physiological variables (endosymbiont density, gross photosynthesis, respiration, tissue biomass) co-vary with chlorophyll-a as expected from holobiont physiology, but their relationship to NCP-altered pH is mediated through the chl-a signal and should not be treated as independent responses. The strength of this indirect chain, quantified through path analysis, is [insert key standardized indirect effect values from the indirect effects table] — ecologically modest but directionally consistent with the hypothesis that community phase shifts carry biogeochemical legacies for individual coral performance.

Path analysis 2 — pH temporal variability

The first path analysis uses the mean pH and DOC experienced by each tank. This section replaces both with temporal variability — the variance of daytime pH and DOC measurements across sampling dates within each tank. Variance captures a different dimension of the biogeochemical environment: not average conditions, but their consistency (or instability) over time.

Both variance terms are right-skewed and are log-transformed prior to z-scoring.

Data preparation

Code 
tank_chem_var <- chem_reframe_DAY_clean |>
  group_by(TREATMENT, TANK_NUM) |>
  summarize(
    NEP_mean    = mean(NEP, na.rm = TRUE),
    log_pH_var  = log(var(pH,  na.rm = TRUE)),
    log_DOC_var = log(var(DOC, na.rm = TRUE)),
    .groups     = "drop"
  ) |>
  drop_na() |>
  mutate(TREATMENT = factor(TREATMENT, levels = treatment_levels))

tank_path_var <- tank_chem_var |>
  mutate(TANK_NUM = as.numeric(TANK_NUM)) |>
  left_join(
    tank_full |> select(TANK_NUM, log_chla, log_endo, log_biomass, mean_GP, mean_R),
    by = "TANK_NUM"
  ) |>
  mutate(across(c(NEP_mean, log_pH_var, log_DOC_var,
                  log_chla, log_endo, log_biomass, mean_GP, mean_R), scale)) |>
  drop_na()

cat("n tanks:", nrow(tank_path_var), "\n")
n tanks: 16
Code 
cat("pH variance range:",  round(range(exp(tank_chem_var$log_pH_var),  na.rm = TRUE), 5), "\n")
pH variance range: 0.00087 0.03311
Code 
cat("DOC variance range:", round(range(exp(tank_chem_var$log_DOC_var), na.rm = TRUE), 1), "µmol²/L²\n")
DOC variance range: 630.2 6345.2 µmol²/L²

Path model

The structure mirrors Path analysis 1, with log_pH_var replacing pH_mean and log_DOC_var replacing DOC_mean.

Code 
var_path_model <- "
  # NCP → log(pH var) (c1) and log(DOC var) (d1)
  log_pH_var  ~ c1*NEP_mean
  log_DOC_var ~ d1*NEP_mean

  # log(pH var) (e1) and log(DOC var) (e2) → Chl-a
  log_chla ~ e1*log_pH_var + e2*log_DOC_var

  # Chl-a → downstream physiology (f1–f4)
  log_endo    ~ f1*log_chla
  mean_GP     ~ f2*log_chla
  mean_R      ~ f3*log_chla
  log_biomass ~ f4*log_chla

  # Residual covariance
  log_pH_var ~~ log_DOC_var

  # --- Indirect effects ---

  ind_NCP_pHvar_Chla      := c1 * e1
  ind_NCP_DOCvar_Chla     := d1 * e2
  ind_NCP_total_Chla      := (c1 * e1) + (d1 * e2)
  ind_pHvar_Chla_Endo     := e1 * f1
  ind_pHvar_Chla_GP       := e1 * f2
  ind_pHvar_Chla_R        := e1 * f3
  ind_pHvar_Chla_Biomass  := e1 * f4
  ind_DOCvar_Chla_Endo    := e2 * f1
  ind_DOCvar_Chla_GP      := e2 * f2
  ind_DOCvar_Chla_R       := e2 * f3
  ind_DOCvar_Chla_Biomass := e2 * f4
  ind_NCP_pHvar_Endo      := c1 * e1 * f1
  ind_NCP_pHvar_GP        := c1 * e1 * f2
  ind_NCP_pHvar_R         := c1 * e1 * f3
  ind_NCP_pHvar_Biomass   := c1 * e1 * f4
  ind_NCP_DOCvar_Endo     := d1 * e2 * f1
  ind_NCP_DOCvar_GP       := d1 * e2 * f2
  ind_NCP_DOCvar_R        := d1 * e2 * f3
  ind_NCP_DOCvar_Biomass  := d1 * e2 * f4
"

fit_var <- sem(var_path_model, data = as.data.frame(tank_path_var), estimator = "ML")
cat("Converged:", lavInspect(fit_var, "converged"), "\n")
Converged: TRUE

Direct path coefficients

Code 
var_path_coefs <- parameterEstimates(fit_var, standardized = TRUE) |>
  filter(op == "~") |>
  select(lhs, rhs, est, se, z, pvalue, std.all) |>
  mutate(
    lhs = recode(lhs,
      NEP_mean    = "NCP",
      log_pH_var  = "log(pH variance)",
      log_DOC_var = "log(DOC variance)",
      log_chla    = "Chl-a (log)",
      log_endo    = "Endosymbiont (log)",
      mean_GP     = "Gross photosynthesis",
      mean_R      = "Respiration",
      log_biomass = "Tissue biomass (log)"
    ),
    rhs = recode(rhs,
      NEP_mean    = "NCP",
      log_pH_var  = "log(pH variance)",
      log_DOC_var = "log(DOC variance)",
      log_chla    = "Chl-a (log)"
    ),
    across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4))
  )

var_path_coefs |>
  kbl(
    caption = paste0(
      "Direct path coefficients from the pH-variance SEM (n = ",
      nrow(tank_path_var), " tanks). All variables z-scored. ",
      "Green = p < 0.05; yellow = 0.05 ≤ p < 0.10."
    ),
    col.names = c("Response", "Predictor", "Estimate", "SE", "z", "p", "Std. β")
  ) |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE) |>
  row_spec(which(var_path_coefs$pvalue < 0.05),  background = "#d4edda") |>
  row_spec(which(var_path_coefs$pvalue >= 0.05 & var_path_coefs$pvalue < 0.10),
           background = "#fff3cd")
Direct path coefficients from the pH-variance SEM (n = 16 tanks). All variables z-scored. Green = p < 0.05; yellow = 0.05 ≤ p < 0.10.
Response Predictor Estimate SE z p Std. β
log(pH variance) NCP 0.6764 0.1841 3.6733 0.0002 0.6764
log(DOC variance) NCP 0.0201 0.2499 0.0805 0.9358 0.0201
Chl-a (log) log(pH variance) 0.5779 0.2046 2.8247 0.0047 0.5779
Chl-a (log) log(DOC variance) -0.5356 0.2046 -2.6179 0.0088 -0.5356
Endosymbiont (log) Chl-a (log) 0.5217 0.2133 2.4461 0.0144 0.5217
Gross photosynthesis Chl-a (log) 0.2629 0.2412 1.0899 0.2758 0.2629
Respiration Chl-a (log) 0.6420 0.1917 3.3493 0.0008 0.6420
Tissue biomass (log) Chl-a (log) 0.5103 0.2150 2.3734 0.0176 0.5103

Path diagram

Code 
var_nodes <- tibble(
  id    = c("NCP",  "pHvar",            "DOCvar",             "Chla",  "Endo",                 "GP",                   "R",           "Bio"),
  label = c("NCP",  "log(pH\nvariance)", "log(DOC\nvariance)", "Chl-a", "Endosymbiont\ndensity","Gross\nphotosynthesis", "Respiration", "Tissue\nbiomass"),
  x     = c(1,      3,                   3,                    5,        7,                       7,                       7,             7),
  y     = c(0,      0.8,                -0.8,                   0,        1.8,                     0.6,                    -0.6,          -1.8)
)

var_direct <- parameterEstimates(fit_var, standardized = TRUE) |>
  filter(op == "~") |>
  select(lhs, rhs, std.all, pvalue) |>
  mutate(
    lhs = recode(lhs, NEP_mean="NCP", log_pH_var="pHvar", log_DOC_var="DOCvar",
                 log_chla="Chla", log_endo="Endo", mean_GP="GP", mean_R="R", log_biomass="Bio"),
    rhs = recode(rhs, NEP_mean="NCP", log_pH_var="pHvar", log_DOC_var="DOCvar", log_chla="Chla"),
    sig = pvalue < 0.05
  )

var_edges <- tibble(
  from = c("NCP",   "NCP",   "pHvar", "DOCvar", "Chla", "Chla", "Chla", "Chla"),
  to   = c("pHvar", "DOCvar","Chla",  "Chla",   "Endo", "GP",   "R",    "Bio")
) |>
  left_join(var_direct |> select(lhs, rhs, std.all, sig),
            by = c("to" = "lhs", "from" = "rhs")) |>
  left_join(var_nodes |> select(id, x, y), by = c("from" = "id")) |>
  rename(x0 = x, y0 = y) |>
  left_join(var_nodes |> select(id, x, y), by = c("to" = "id")) |>
  rename(x1 = x, y1 = y)

var_edge_coords <- pmap_dfr(var_edges, function(from, to, std.all, sig, x0, y0, x1, y1) {
  dx <- x1-x0; dy <- y1-y0; d <- sqrt(dx^2+dy^2)
  tibble(from, to, coef=std.all, sig,
         xs=x0+dx/d*0.55, ys=y0+dy/d*0.55,
         xe=x1-dx/d*0.50, ye=y1-dy/d*0.50,
         mx=(x0+dx/d*0.55+x1-dx/d*0.50)/2,
         my=(y0+dy/d*0.55+y1-dy/d*0.50)/2)
})

ggplot() +
  geom_segment(
    data = var_edge_coords,
    aes(x = xs, y = ys, xend = xe, yend = ye, color = sig),
    linewidth = 0.9,
    arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.22, "cm"), type = "closed"),
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_label(
    data = var_edge_coords,
    aes(x = mx, y = my, label = sprintf("%.2f", coef), color = sig),
    size = 2.8, label.padding = unit(0.12, "lines"), label.size = 0,
    fill = "white", show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_tile(
    data = var_nodes,
    aes(x = x, y = y),
    width = 0.95, height = 0.42,
    fill = "white", color = "grey35", linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = var_nodes,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
    size = 2.7, lineheight = 0.9
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#2ca25f", "FALSE" = "grey60")) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.3, y = -2.5,
           label = "Green = p < 0.05   Grey = n.s.   Coefficients are standardized (\u03b2)",
           hjust = 0, size = 2.8, color = "grey30") +
  coord_equal(xlim = c(0.3, 7.7), ylim = c(-2.6, 2.2), expand = FALSE) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(8, 8, 8, 8))

Indirect effects

Code 
var_indirect <- parameterEstimates(fit_var, standardized = TRUE) |>
  filter(op == ":=") |>
  select(label, est, se, z, pvalue, std.all) |>
  mutate(
    Pathway = recode(label,
      ind_NCP_pHvar_Chla      = "NCP → log(pH var.) → Chl-a",
      ind_NCP_DOCvar_Chla     = "NCP → log(DOC var.) → Chl-a",
      ind_NCP_total_Chla      = "NCP → [log(pH var.) + log(DOC var.)] → Chl-a  (total)",
      ind_pHvar_Chla_Endo     = "log(pH var.) → Chl-a → Endosymbiont",
      ind_pHvar_Chla_GP       = "log(pH var.) → Chl-a → Gross photosynthesis",
      ind_pHvar_Chla_R        = "log(pH var.) → Chl-a → Respiration",
      ind_pHvar_Chla_Biomass  = "log(pH var.) → Chl-a → Tissue biomass",
      ind_DOCvar_Chla_Endo    = "log(DOC var.) → Chl-a → Endosymbiont",
      ind_DOCvar_Chla_GP      = "log(DOC var.) → Chl-a → Gross photosynthesis",
      ind_DOCvar_Chla_R       = "log(DOC var.) → Chl-a → Respiration",
      ind_DOCvar_Chla_Biomass = "log(DOC var.) → Chl-a → Tissue biomass",
      ind_NCP_pHvar_Endo      = "NCP → log(pH var.) → Chl-a → Endosymbiont",
      ind_NCP_pHvar_GP        = "NCP → log(pH var.) → Chl-a → Gross photosynthesis",
      ind_NCP_pHvar_R         = "NCP → log(pH var.) → Chl-a → Respiration",
      ind_NCP_pHvar_Biomass   = "NCP → log(pH var.) → Chl-a → Tissue biomass",
      ind_NCP_DOCvar_Endo     = "NCP → log(DOC var.) → Chl-a → Endosymbiont",
      ind_NCP_DOCvar_GP       = "NCP → log(DOC var.) → Chl-a → Gross photosynthesis",
      ind_NCP_DOCvar_R        = "NCP → log(DOC var.) → Chl-a → Respiration",
      ind_NCP_DOCvar_Biomass  = "NCP → log(DOC var.) → Chl-a → Tissue biomass"
    ),
    across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)),
    Chain = case_when(
      grepl("^NCP → \\[", Pathway)                  ~ "NCP → Chl-a (total)",
      grepl("^NCP → log\\(pH.*Chla$", Pathway)      ~ "NCP → Chl-a (total)",
      grepl("^NCP → log\\(DOC.*Chla$", Pathway)     ~ "NCP → Chl-a (total)",
      grepl("^NCP → log\\(pH.*→ Chl-a →", Pathway) ~ "NCP → log(pH var.) → Chl-a → downstream",
      grepl("^NCP → log\\(DOC.*→ Chl-a →", Pathway)~ "NCP → log(DOC var.) → Chl-a → downstream",
      grepl("^log\\(pH", Pathway)                   ~ "log(pH var.) → Chl-a → downstream",
      grepl("^log\\(DOC", Pathway)                  ~ "log(DOC var.) → Chl-a → downstream",
      TRUE                                          ~ "Other"
    )
  ) |>
  arrange(Chain, desc(abs(est)))

var_indirect |>
  select(Chain, Pathway, est, se, z, pvalue, std.all) |>
  kbl(
    caption = "Indirect effects from the pH-variance SEM. Green = p < 0.05; yellow = 0.05 ≤ p < 0.10.",
    col.names = c("Chain group", "Pathway", "Estimate", "SE", "z", "p", "Std. β")
  ) |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE) |>
  collapse_rows(columns = 1, valign = "top") |>
  row_spec(which(var_indirect$pvalue < 0.05),  background = "#d4edda") |>
  row_spec(which(var_indirect$pvalue >= 0.05 & var_indirect$pvalue < 0.10),
           background = "#fff3cd")
Indirect effects from the pH-variance SEM. Green = p < 0.05; yellow = 0.05 ≤ p < 0.10.
Chain group Pathway Estimate SE z p Std. β
NCP → Chl-a (total) NCP → [log(pH var.) + log(DOC var.)] → Chl-a (total) 0.3801 0.1879 2.0231 0.0431 0.3801
NCP → log(DOC var.) → Chl-a → downstream NCP → log(DOC var.) → Chl-a → Respiration -0.0069 0.0860 -0.0805 0.9359 -0.0069
NCP → log(DOC var.) → Chl-a → Endosymbiont -0.0056 0.0699 -0.0805 0.9359 -0.0056
NCP → log(DOC var.) → Chl-a → Tissue biomass -0.0055 0.0684 -0.0805 0.9359 -0.0055
NCP → log(DOC var.) → Chl-a → Gross photosynthesis -0.0028 0.0353 -0.0803 0.9360 -0.0028
NCP → log(pH var.) → Chl-a → downstream NCP → log(pH var.) → Chl-a → Respiration 0.2509 0.1348 1.8615 0.0627 0.2509
NCP → log(pH var.) → Chl-a → Endosymbiont 0.2039 0.1235 1.6517 0.0986 0.2039
NCP → log(pH var.) → Chl-a → Tissue biomass 0.1995 0.1225 1.6287 0.1034 0.1995
NCP → log(pH var.) → Chl-a → Gross photosynthesis 0.1028 0.1049 0.9800 0.3271 0.1028
Other NCP → log(pH var.) → Chl-a 0.3909 0.1746 2.2392 0.0251 0.3909
NCP → log(DOC var.) → Chl-a -0.0108 0.1339 -0.0805 0.9358 -0.0108
log(DOC var.) → Chl-a → downstream log(DOC var.) → Chl-a → Respiration -0.3438 0.1667 -2.0626 0.0392 -0.3438
log(DOC var.) → Chl-a → Endosymbiont -0.2794 0.1563 -1.7873 0.0739 -0.2794
log(DOC var.) → Chl-a → Tissue biomass -0.2733 0.1554 -1.7583 0.0787 -0.2733
log(DOC var.) → Chl-a → Gross photosynthesis -0.1408 0.1399 -1.0062 0.3143 -0.1408
log(pH var.) → Chl-a → downstream log(pH var.) → Chl-a → Respiration 0.3710 0.1718 2.1593 0.0308 0.3710
log(pH var.) → Chl-a → Endosymbiont 0.3015 0.1630 1.8491 0.0644 0.3015
log(pH var.) → Chl-a → Tissue biomass 0.2949 0.1623 1.8171 0.0692 0.2949
log(pH var.) → Chl-a → Gross photosynthesis 0.1519 0.1494 1.0168 0.3092 0.1519

Data visualization

Code 
plot_m2 <- tank_chem_var |>
  mutate(TANK_NUM = as.numeric(TANK_NUM)) |>
  left_join(
    tank_full |> select(TANK_NUM, mean_chla, mean_endo, mean_biomass, mean_GP, mean_R),
    by = "TANK_NUM"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    pH_sd  = sqrt(exp(log_pH_var)),
    DOC_sd = sqrt(exp(log_DOC_var))
  )

p2a <- scatter_path(plot_m2, "NEP_mean", "pH_sd",
                    expression("NCP  (mmol C m"^-2~hr^-1~")"),
                    "pH SD (units)")
p2b <- scatter_path(plot_m2, "pH_sd", "mean_chla",
                    "pH SD (units)",
                    expression("Chl-a  ("*mu*g~cm^-2*")"), log_y = TRUE)
p2c <- scatter_path(plot_m2, "DOC_sd", "mean_chla",
                    expression("DOC SD  ("*mu*mol~L^-1*")"),
                    expression("Chl-a  ("*mu*g~cm^-2*")"), log_y = TRUE)
p2d <- scatter_path(plot_m2, "mean_chla", "mean_endo",
                    expression("Chl-a  ("*mu*g~cm^-2*")"),
                    expression("Endosymbiont  (10"^6~cm^-2*")"), log_y = TRUE)
p2e <- scatter_path(plot_m2, "mean_chla", "mean_R",
                    expression("Chl-a  ("*mu*g~cm^-2*")"),
                    expression("Respiration  ("*mu*mol~O[2]~cm^-2~hr^-1*")"))
p2f <- scatter_path(plot_m2, "mean_chla", "mean_biomass",
                    expression("Chl-a  ("*mu*g~cm^-2*")"),
                    expression("Tissue biomass  (mg cm"^-2*")"), log_y = TRUE)

fig2 <- (p2a | p2b | p2c) / (p2d | p2e | p2f) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "a") &
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"))

wrap_plots(fig2, leg, ncol = 1, heights = c(10, 1))

Global model fit

Code 
fitMeasures(fit_var, c("chisq", "df", "pvalue", "cfi", "rmsea", "srmr")) |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  setNames("Value") |>
  mutate(Value = round(Value, 4)) |>
  kbl(caption = "Global fit statistics for the pH-variance model.") |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = "striped", full_width = FALSE, position = "left")
Global fit statistics for the pH-variance model.
Value
chisq 16.7506
df 13.0000
pvalue 0.2110
cfi 0.9296
rmsea 0.1343
srmr 0.1245
Warning

Model fit with n = 16: Same n = 16 limitations apply. χ²/df = 16.8/13 = 1.29, p = 0.211. CFI (0.93) and RMSEA (0.13) are slightly better than the means model, suggesting the variance specification fits the data marginally better.

Interpretation

The variance model asks whether the fluctuation in pH and DOC — rather than mean levels — predicts coral physiology. This model also fits the data slightly better than the means model (CFI = 0.93 vs. 0.90).

NCP predicts pH variability but not DOC variability. Higher NCP is associated with greater temporal variance in pH (β = 0.676, p < 0.001), consistent with more photosynthetically active communities generating larger diel pH swings. NCP does not predict DOC variance (β = 0.020, p = 0.936), suggesting DOC fluctuation is driven by processes other than gross production (e.g., heterotrophic activity, particulate release, or physical flushing dynamics).

pH variability positively predicts chlorophyll-a (β = 0.578, p = 0.005), at a similar magnitude to the pH mean effect. Corals in more biogeochemically dynamic tanks invest more in light-harvesting pigmentation regardless of absolute pH level.

DOC variability negatively predicts chlorophyll-a (β = −0.536, p = 0.009) — a striking result absent in the means model, where DOC mean was non-significant. Tanks with more variable DOC may expose corals to episodic high-DOC pulses that favour heterotrophic competitors or microbial activity that suppresses symbiont function. This warrants investigation but should be interpreted cautiously given n = 16.

The downstream Chl-a → physiology paths are essentially unchanged between models, as expected — those relationships are determined by coral biology, not by which chemistry metric precedes Chl-a.

Path analysis 3 — Day + Night means

This model uses the same structure as Path analysis 1 but averages chemistry (NCP, pH, DOC) across both noon (12:00) and 9 pm (21:00) measurements, rather than daytime only. Averaging in nighttime readings attenuates the NCP signal — net respiration at night partially offsets gross daytime production — providing a conservative test of whether the pH-mediated pathway holds across the full diel cycle.

Note

The same outlier filters applied in Model 1 are used here. DOC measurements from the deltaDOC column are excluded from the select since they are not needed for the path model and are not available at all time points.

Data preparation

Code 
chem_reframe_DAYNIGHT_clean <- Data |>
  filter(TIME %in% c(hms::as_hms("12:00:00"), hms::as_hms("21:00:00"))) |>
  group_by(TREATMENT, DATE, TANK_NUM) |>
  select(DATE, TIME, TANK_NUM, TREATMENT,
         TA, pH, DIC_umol_kg, NPOC_uM, deltaTA, deltaDIC, NEC, NEP) |>
  rename(DOC = NPOC_uM) |>
  mutate(
    deltaDIC    = ifelse(deltaDIC < -250,    NA, deltaDIC),
    deltaTA     = ifelse(deltaTA < -400,     NA, deltaTA),
    DIC_umol_kg = ifelse(DIC_umol_kg > 2250, NA, DIC_umol_kg),
    DOC         = ifelse(DOC > 350,          NA, DOC),
    NEC         = ifelse(NEC < -2,           NA, NEC),
    NEC         = ifelse(TREATMENT == "Rubble_Dom" & NEC > 2, NA, NEC),
    NEP         = ifelse(NEP < -2.1,         NA, NEP),
    NEP         = ifelse(NEP > 5,            NA, NEP),
    pH          = ifelse(pH < 7.8,           NA, pH),
    TA          = ifelse(TA > 2700,          NA, TA)
  )

tank_chem_dn <- chem_reframe_DAYNIGHT_clean |>
  group_by(TREATMENT, TANK_NUM) |>
  summarize(
    NEP_mean = mean(NEP, na.rm = TRUE),
    pH_mean  = mean(pH,  na.rm = TRUE),
    DOC_mean = mean(DOC, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups  = "drop"
  ) |>
  drop_na() |>
  mutate(TREATMENT = factor(TREATMENT, levels = treatment_levels))

tank_path_dn <- tank_chem_dn |>
  mutate(TANK_NUM = as.numeric(TANK_NUM)) |>
  left_join(
    tank_full |> select(TANK_NUM, log_chla, log_endo, log_biomass, mean_GP, mean_R),
    by = "TANK_NUM"
  ) |>
  mutate(across(c(NEP_mean, pH_mean, DOC_mean,
                  log_chla, log_endo, log_biomass, mean_GP, mean_R), scale)) |>
  drop_na()

cat("n tanks in path model:", nrow(tank_path_dn), "\n")
n tanks in path model: 16
Code 
cat("pH range (day+night):",  round(diff(range(tank_chem_dn$pH_mean)), 4), "units\n")
pH range (day+night): 0.0454 units
Code 
cat("DOC range (day+night):", round(diff(range(tank_chem_dn$DOC_mean)), 1), "µmol/L\n")
DOC range (day+night): 63 µmol/L
Code 
cat("NEP range (day+night):", paste(round(range(tank_chem_dn$NEP_mean), 3), collapse = " to "), "\n")
NEP range (day+night): -0.131 to 1.003

Path model

Code 
tank_path_model_dn <- "
  # NCP → pH (c1) and DOC (d1)
  pH_mean  ~ c1*NEP_mean
  DOC_mean ~ d1*NEP_mean

  # pH (e1) and DOC (e2) → Chl-a
  log_chla ~ e1*pH_mean + e2*DOC_mean

  # Chl-a → downstream physiology (f1–f4)
  log_endo    ~ f1*log_chla
  mean_GP     ~ f2*log_chla
  mean_R      ~ f3*log_chla
  log_biomass ~ f4*log_chla

  # Residual covariance between pH and DOC after accounting for NCP
  pH_mean ~~ DOC_mean

  # --- Indirect effects ---
  ind_NCP_pH_Chla     := c1 * e1
  ind_NCP_DOC_Chla    := d1 * e2
  ind_NCP_total_Chla  := (c1 * e1) + (d1 * e2)

  ind_pH_Chla_Endo    := e1 * f1
  ind_pH_Chla_GP      := e1 * f2
  ind_pH_Chla_R       := e1 * f3
  ind_pH_Chla_Biomass := e1 * f4

  ind_DOC_Chla_Endo    := e2 * f1
  ind_DOC_Chla_GP      := e2 * f2
  ind_DOC_Chla_R       := e2 * f3
  ind_DOC_Chla_Biomass := e2 * f4

  ind_NCP_pH_Endo     := c1 * e1 * f1
  ind_NCP_pH_GP       := c1 * e1 * f2
  ind_NCP_pH_R        := c1 * e1 * f3
  ind_NCP_pH_Biomass  := c1 * e1 * f4

  ind_NCP_DOC_Endo    := d1 * e2 * f1
  ind_NCP_DOC_GP      := d1 * e2 * f2
  ind_NCP_DOC_R       := d1 * e2 * f3
  ind_NCP_DOC_Biomass := d1 * e2 * f4
"

fit_dn <- sem(tank_path_model_dn,
              data      = as.data.frame(tank_path_dn),
              estimator = "ML")
cat("Converged:", lavInspect(fit_dn, "converged"), "\n")
Converged: TRUE

Direct path coefficients

Code 
dn_path_coefs <- parameterEstimates(fit_dn, standardized = TRUE) |>
  filter(op == "~") |>
  select(lhs, rhs, est, se, z, pvalue, std.all) |>
  mutate(
    lhs = recode(lhs,
      NEP_mean    = "NCP",
      pH_mean     = "pH",
      DOC_mean    = "DOC",
      log_chla    = "Chl-a (log)",
      log_endo    = "Endosymbiont (log)",
      mean_GP     = "Gross photosynthesis",
      mean_R      = "Respiration",
      log_biomass = "Tissue biomass (log)"
    ),
    rhs = recode(rhs,
      NEP_mean = "NCP",
      pH_mean  = "pH",
      DOC_mean = "DOC",
      log_chla = "Chl-a (log)"
    ),
    across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4))
  )

dn_path_coefs |>
  kbl(
    caption = paste0(
      "Direct path coefficients from the day+night SEM (n = ",
      nrow(tank_path_dn), " tanks). All variables z-scored. ",
      "Green = p < 0.05; yellow = 0.05 ≤ p < 0.10."
    ),
    col.names = c("Response", "Predictor", "Estimate", "SE", "z", "p", "Std. β")
  ) |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE) |>
  row_spec(which(dn_path_coefs$pvalue < 0.05),  background = "#d4edda") |>
  row_spec(which(dn_path_coefs$pvalue >= 0.05 & dn_path_coefs$pvalue < 0.10),
           background = "#fff3cd")
Direct path coefficients from the day+night SEM (n = 16 tanks). All variables z-scored. Green = p < 0.05; yellow = 0.05 ≤ p < 0.10.
Response Predictor Estimate SE z p Std. β
pH NCP 0.3124 0.2375 1.3156 0.1883 0.3124
DOC NCP 0.0434 0.2498 0.1738 0.8620 0.0434
Chl-a (log) pH 0.4268 0.2522 1.6922 0.0906 0.4268
Chl-a (log) DOC -0.2095 0.2522 -0.8307 0.4061 -0.2095
Endosymbiont (log) Chl-a (log) 0.5217 0.2133 2.4461 0.0144 0.5217
Gross photosynthesis Chl-a (log) 0.2629 0.2412 1.0899 0.2758 0.2629
Respiration Chl-a (log) 0.6420 0.1917 3.3493 0.0008 0.6420
Tissue biomass (log) Chl-a (log) 0.5103 0.2150 2.3734 0.0176 0.5103

Path diagram

Code 
dn_nodes <- tibble(
  id    = c("NCP",  "pH",  "DOC",  "Chla",  "Endo",                  "GP",                   "R",           "Bio"),
  label = c("NCP",  "pH",  "DOC",  "Chl-a", "Endosymbiont\ndensity", "Gross\nphotosynthesis", "Respiration", "Tissue\nbiomass"),
  x     = c(1,      3,     3,      5,        7,                        7,                       7,             7),
  y     = c(0,      0.8,  -0.8,    0,        1.8,                      0.6,                    -0.6,          -1.8)
)

dn_direct <- parameterEstimates(fit_dn, standardized = TRUE) |>
  filter(op == "~") |>
  select(lhs, rhs, std.all, pvalue) |>
  mutate(
    lhs = recode(lhs, NEP_mean="NCP", pH_mean="pH", DOC_mean="DOC",
                 log_chla="Chla", log_endo="Endo", mean_GP="GP", mean_R="R", log_biomass="Bio"),
    rhs = recode(rhs, NEP_mean="NCP", pH_mean="pH", DOC_mean="DOC", log_chla="Chla"),
    sig = pvalue < 0.05
  )

dn_edges <- tibble(
  from = c("NCP", "NCP", "pH",   "DOC",  "Chla", "Chla", "Chla", "Chla"),
  to   = c("pH",  "DOC", "Chla", "Chla", "Endo", "GP",   "R",    "Bio")
) |>
  left_join(dn_direct |> select(lhs, rhs, std.all, sig),
            by = c("to" = "lhs", "from" = "rhs")) |>
  left_join(dn_nodes |> select(id, x, y), by = c("from" = "id")) |>
  rename(x0 = x, y0 = y) |>
  left_join(dn_nodes |> select(id, x, y), by = c("to" = "id")) |>
  rename(x1 = x, y1 = y)

dn_edge_coords <- pmap_dfr(dn_edges, function(from, to, std.all, sig, x0, y0, x1, y1) {
  dx <- x1 - x0; dy <- y1 - y0; d <- sqrt(dx^2 + dy^2)
  tibble(from, to, coef = std.all, sig,
         xs = x0 + dx/d * 0.5, ys = y0 + dy/d * 0.5,
         xe = x1 - dx/d * 0.5, ye = y1 - dy/d * 0.5,
         mx = (x0 + dx/d * 0.5 + x1 - dx/d * 0.5) / 2,
         my = (y0 + dy/d * 0.5 + y1 - dy/d * 0.5) / 2)
})

ggplot() +
  geom_segment(
    data = dn_edge_coords,
    aes(x = xs, y = ys, xend = xe, yend = ye, color = sig),
    linewidth = 0.9,
    arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.22, "cm"), type = "closed"),
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_label(
    data = dn_edge_coords,
    aes(x = mx, y = my, label = sprintf("%.2f", coef), color = sig),
    size = 2.8, label.padding = unit(0.12, "lines"), label.size = 0,
    fill = "white", show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_tile(
    data = dn_nodes,
    aes(x = x, y = y),
    width = 0.9, height = 0.42,
    fill = "white", color = "grey35", linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = dn_nodes,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
    size = 2.9, lineheight = 0.9
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#2ca25f", "FALSE" = "grey60")) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.3, y = -2.5,
           label = "Green = p < 0.05   Grey = n.s.   Coefficients are standardized (\u03b2)",
           hjust = 0, size = 2.8, color = "grey30") +
  coord_equal(xlim = c(0.3, 7.7), ylim = c(-2.6, 2.2), expand = FALSE) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(8, 8, 8, 8))

Indirect effects

Code 
dn_indirect <- parameterEstimates(fit_dn, standardized = TRUE) |>
  filter(op == ":=") |>
  select(label, est, se, z, pvalue, std.all) |>
  mutate(
    Pathway = recode(label,
      ind_NCP_pH_Chla      = "NCP → pH → Chl-a",
      ind_NCP_DOC_Chla     = "NCP → DOC → Chl-a",
      ind_NCP_total_Chla   = "NCP → [pH + DOC] → Chl-a  (total)",
      ind_pH_Chla_Endo     = "pH → Chl-a → Endosymbiont",
      ind_pH_Chla_GP       = "pH → Chl-a → Gross photosynthesis",
      ind_pH_Chla_R        = "pH → Chl-a → Respiration",
      ind_pH_Chla_Biomass  = "pH → Chl-a → Tissue biomass",
      ind_DOC_Chla_Endo    = "DOC → Chl-a → Endosymbiont",
      ind_DOC_Chla_GP      = "DOC → Chl-a → Gross photosynthesis",
      ind_DOC_Chla_R       = "DOC → Chl-a → Respiration",
      ind_DOC_Chla_Biomass = "DOC → Chl-a → Tissue biomass",
      ind_NCP_pH_Endo      = "NCP → pH → Chl-a → Endosymbiont",
      ind_NCP_pH_GP        = "NCP → pH → Chl-a → Gross photosynthesis",
      ind_NCP_pH_R         = "NCP → pH → Chl-a → Respiration",
      ind_NCP_pH_Biomass   = "NCP → pH → Chl-a → Tissue biomass",
      ind_NCP_DOC_Endo     = "NCP → DOC → Chl-a → Endosymbiont",
      ind_NCP_DOC_GP       = "NCP → DOC → Chl-a → Gross photosynthesis",
      ind_NCP_DOC_R        = "NCP → DOC → Chl-a → Respiration",
      ind_NCP_DOC_Biomass  = "NCP → DOC → Chl-a → Tissue biomass"
    ),
    across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)),
    Chain = case_when(
      grepl("^NCP → \\[", Pathway)          ~ "NCP → Chl-a (total)",
      grepl("^NCP → pH → Chl-a$", Pathway)  ~ "NCP → Chl-a (total)",
      grepl("^NCP → DOC → Chl-a$", Pathway) ~ "NCP → Chl-a (total)",
      grepl("^NCP → pH → Chl-a →", Pathway) ~ "NCP → pH → Chl-a → downstream",
      grepl("^NCP → DOC → Chl-a →", Pathway)~ "NCP → DOC → Chl-a → downstream",
      grepl("^pH", Pathway)                  ~ "pH → Chl-a → downstream",
      grepl("^DOC", Pathway)                 ~ "DOC → Chl-a → downstream",
      TRUE                                   ~ "Other"
    )
  ) |>
  arrange(Chain, desc(abs(est)))

dn_indirect |>
  select(Chain, Pathway, est, se, z, pvalue, std.all) |>
  kbl(
    caption = paste0(
      "Indirect (mediated) effects from the day+night SEM. ",
      "Estimates are products of the relevant direct path coefficients; ",
      "SEs are from the delta method. ",
      "Green = p < 0.05; yellow = 0.05 ≤ p < 0.10."
    ),
    col.names = c("Chain group", "Pathway", "Estimate", "SE", "z", "p", "Std. β")
  ) |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE) |>
  collapse_rows(columns = 1, valign = "top") |>
  row_spec(which(dn_indirect$pvalue < 0.05),  background = "#d4edda") |>
  row_spec(which(dn_indirect$pvalue >= 0.05 & dn_indirect$pvalue < 0.10),
           background = "#fff3cd")
Indirect (mediated) effects from the day+night SEM. Estimates are products of the relevant direct path coefficients; SEs are from the delta method. Green = p < 0.05; yellow = 0.05 ≤ p < 0.10.
Chain group Pathway Estimate SE z p Std. β
DOC → Chl-a → downstream DOC → Chl-a → Respiration -0.1345 0.1668 -0.8063 0.4201 -0.1345
DOC → Chl-a → Endosymbiont -0.1093 0.1389 -0.7866 0.4315 -0.1093
DOC → Chl-a → Tissue biomass -0.1069 0.1363 -0.7841 0.4330 -0.1069
DOC → Chl-a → Gross photosynthesis -0.0551 0.0834 -0.6607 0.5088 -0.0551
NCP → Chl-a (total) NCP → pH → Chl-a 0.1333 0.1284 1.0386 0.2990 0.1333
NCP → [pH + DOC] → Chl-a (total) 0.1242 0.1192 1.0422 0.2973 0.1242
NCP → DOC → Chl-a -0.0091 0.0535 -0.1701 0.8649 -0.0091
NCP → DOC → Chl-a → downstream NCP → DOC → Chl-a → Respiration -0.0058 0.0344 -0.1699 0.8651 -0.0058
NCP → DOC → Chl-a → Endosymbiont -0.0047 0.0280 -0.1697 0.8652 -0.0047
NCP → DOC → Chl-a → Tissue biomass -0.0046 0.0273 -0.1697 0.8652 -0.0046
NCP → DOC → Chl-a → Gross photosynthesis -0.0024 0.0142 -0.1681 0.8665 -0.0024
NCP → pH → Chl-a → downstream NCP → pH → Chl-a → Respiration 0.0856 0.0863 0.9920 0.3212 0.0856
NCP → pH → Chl-a → Endosymbiont 0.0696 0.0728 0.9560 0.3391 0.0696
NCP → pH → Chl-a → Tissue biomass 0.0680 0.0715 0.9515 0.3413 0.0680
NCP → pH → Chl-a → Gross photosynthesis 0.0351 0.0466 0.7519 0.4521 0.0351
pH → Chl-a → downstream pH → Chl-a → Respiration 0.2740 0.1814 1.5103 0.1310 0.2740
pH → Chl-a → Endosymbiont 0.2226 0.1600 1.3916 0.1640 0.2226
pH → Chl-a → Tissue biomass 0.2178 0.1580 1.3778 0.1683 0.2178
pH → Chl-a → Gross photosynthesis 0.1122 0.1224 0.9163 0.3595 0.1122

Data visualization

Code 
plot_m3 <- tank_chem_dn |>
  mutate(TANK_NUM = as.numeric(TANK_NUM)) |>
  left_join(
    tank_full |> select(TANK_NUM, mean_chla, mean_endo, mean_biomass, mean_GP, mean_R),
    by = "TANK_NUM"
  )

p3a <- scatter_path(plot_m3, "NEP_mean", "pH_mean",
                    expression("NCP  (mmol C m"^-2~hr^-1~")"),
                    expression("Mean pH"[T]))
p3b <- scatter_path(plot_m3, "pH_mean", "mean_chla",
                    expression("Mean pH"[T]),
                    expression("Chl-a  ("*mu*g~cm^-2*")"), log_y = TRUE)
p3c <- scatter_path(plot_m3, "DOC_mean", "mean_chla",
                    expression("Mean DOC  ("*mu*mol~L^-1*")"),
                    expression("Chl-a  ("*mu*g~cm^-2*")"), log_y = TRUE)
p3d <- scatter_path(plot_m3, "mean_chla", "mean_endo",
                    expression("Chl-a  ("*mu*g~cm^-2*")"),
                    expression("Endosymbiont  (10"^6~cm^-2*")"), log_y = TRUE)
p3e <- scatter_path(plot_m3, "mean_chla", "mean_R",
                    expression("Chl-a  ("*mu*g~cm^-2*")"),
                    expression("Respiration  ("*mu*mol~O[2]~cm^-2~hr^-1*")"))
p3f <- scatter_path(plot_m3, "mean_chla", "mean_biomass",
                    expression("Chl-a  ("*mu*g~cm^-2*")"),
                    expression("Tissue biomass  (mg cm"^-2*")"), log_y = TRUE)

fig3 <- (p3a | p3b | p3c) / (p3d | p3e | p3f) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "a") &
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"))

wrap_plots(fig3, leg, ncol = 1, heights = c(10, 1))

Global model fit

Code 
fitMeasures(fit_dn, c("chisq", "df", "pvalue", "cfi", "rmsea", "srmr")) |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  setNames("Value") |>
  mutate(Value = round(Value, 4)) |>
  kbl(caption = "Global fit statistics for the day+night means model.") |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = "striped", full_width = FALSE, position = "left")
Global fit statistics for the day+night means model.
Value
chisq 17.9633
df 13.0000
pvalue 0.1589
cfi 0.8763
rmsea 0.1545
srmr 0.1624
Warning

Model fit with n = 16: χ²/df = 17.96/13 = 1.38, p = 0.159. CFI (0.876) falls slightly below the conventional 0.90 threshold, and RMSEA (0.154) is similar to Model 1. Interpret with the same n = 16 caveats; the weaker fit relative to Models 1 and 2 may reflect the attenuation of the NCP → pH signal when nighttime measurements are included.

Interpretation

The day+night model asks whether the daytime-only findings in Model 1 are robust to inclusion of nighttime chemistry. The short answer is: the downstream Chl-a → physiology chain is unchanged, but the NCP → biogeochemistry segment is substantially attenuated.

NCP no longer predicts mean pH or DOC. Including nighttime measurements (when photosynthesis ceases and respiration returns CO₂ to the water column) halves the effective NCP signal — tank-mean NEP across noon and 9 pm ranges from −0.13 to +1.00 mmol C m⁻² hr⁻¹, compared to purely positive daytime values. This collapses the NCP → pH path (β = 0.31, p = 0.19), consistent with diel pH buffering eroding the community-level biogeochemical signature.

pH retains a marginal positive association with Chl-a (β = 0.43, p = 0.09), suggesting the daytime pH signal partly persists in tank-average conditions even when nights are included. DOC remains non-significant (β = −0.21, p = 0.41).

Chlorophyll-a → downstream physiology paths are unchanged, as expected — these are biological relationships within the coral holobiont, independent of which chemistry metric precedes Chl-a.

The comparison across models supports daytime-only measurements as the appropriate time window for testing the NCP → biogeochemistry → coral physiology hypothesis. Nighttime respiration actively erases the biogeochemical differentiation created by daytime production, so averaging over both time points obscures the mechanism of interest.

Document generated: 2026-04-17 17:33:06.79749

Source Code
---
title: "Path analysis: NCP → Biogeochemistry → Coral physiology"
subtitle: "Material Legacies / Indirect Effects — *Limnology and Oceanography* Revision"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    self-contained: true
    theme: flatly
    fig-width: 9
    fig-height: 6
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
  echo: true
---


## Overview

This document presents a tank-level path analysis testing the proposed causal chain:

```
NCP → pH, DOC
pH + DOC → Chlorophyll-a → Endosymbiont density, GP, R, Tissue biomass
```

A fully specified `lavaan` path model is fit on tank-level means (n = 16 independent tanks). Path coefficients are labeled so that **indirect (mediated) effects** can be computed via the delta method, quantifying how much of the NCP signal propagates through to coral physiology at each step of the chain.

---

# Setup

```{r load-packages}
#| label: load-packages
#| code-fold: false

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(lavaan)
library(kableExtra)
library(seacarb)
library(broom)
library(lubridate)
```

---

# Data loading

```{r load-metadata}
#| label: load-metadata

metadata <- read_csv(here("Data", "MO24BEAST_Metadata_FULL.csv")) |>
  mutate(
    TREATMENT = factor(TREATMENT,
                       levels = c("Control", "Algae_Dom", "Coral_Dom", "Rubble_Dom")),
    mean_tissue_biomass = ifelse(mean_tissue_biomass > 30, NA, mean_tissue_biomass)
  )
```

```{r load-chem}
#| label: load-chem

pHcalib  <- read_csv(here("Data", "Chemistry", "TrisCalSummer2024.csv"))
pHData   <- read_csv(here("Data", "Chemistry", "CarbonateChemistry.csv"))
TableID  <- read_csv(here("Data", "TableID.csv"))
DOC_data <- read_csv(here("Data", "DOC", "DOC_full_data.csv"))

pHSlope <- pHcalib |>
  nest_by(TrisCalDate) |>
  mutate(fitpH = list(lm(mVTris ~ TTris, data = pHcalib))) |>
  reframe(broom::tidy(fitpH)) |>
  select(TrisCalDate, term, estimate) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = term, values_from = estimate) |>
  right_join(pHData, by = "TrisCalDate") |>
  mutate(mVTris = TEMPINLAB * TTris + `(Intercept)`) |>
  drop_na(TEMPINSITU, mV) |>
  mutate(pH = pH(Ex = mV, Etris = mVTris, S = SALINITY, T = TEMPINLAB)) |>
  drop_na(TEMPINSITU, TEMPINLAB, SALINITY, pH) |>
  mutate(pH_insitu = pHinsi(
    pH = pH, ALK = 2200, Tinsi = TEMPINSITU, Tlab = TEMPINLAB,
    S = SALINITY, Pt = 0.1, k1k2 = "m10", kf = "dg"
  )) |>
  select(-pH) |> rename(pH = pH_insitu) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(-c(mV, TrisCalDate, TTris, `(Intercept)`, mVTris))

DIC_calc <- pHSlope |>
  drop_na(pH, TA) |>
  mutate(TA_mol_kg = TA / 1e6)

carb_table <- carb(
  flag = 8, var1 = DIC_calc$pH, var2 = DIC_calc$TA_mol_kg,
  S = DIC_calc$SALINITY, T = DIC_calc$TEMPINSITU,
  P = 0, Patm = 0, Pt = 0, Sit = 0,
  pHscale = "T", kf = "dg", k1k2 = "m10", ks = "d"
)

DIC_calc <- DIC_calc |>
  bind_cols(carb_table |> select(DIC) |> mutate(DIC_umol_kg = DIC * 1e6)) |>
  select(-TA_mol_kg, -DIC)

pHSlope2 <- pHSlope |>
  left_join(DIC_calc |> select(any_of(names(pHSlope)), DIC_umol_kg),
            by = intersect(names(pHSlope), names(DIC_calc))) |>
  mutate(TREATMENT = ifelse(is.na(TREATMENT), "Inflow", TREATMENT)) |>
  full_join(DOC_data |> select(-DATETIME),
            by = intersect(names(pHSlope), names(DOC_data))) |>
  select(-c(NPOC_mg_L, TN_mg_L))

InflowData <- pHSlope2 |>
  filter(TANK_NUM %in% c("Inflow1", "Inflow2")) |>
  select(-c(FLOW_LEFT, FLOW_RIGHT, Notes, DO_MG_L, SALINITY, TEMPINSITU)) |>
  rename(pH_inflow = pH, TA_inflow = TA,
         DIC_inflow = DIC_umol_kg, DOC_inflow = NPOC_uM) |>
  mutate(INFLOW_TABLE = ifelse(TANK_NUM == "Inflow1", 1, 2)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(DATE, TIME, INFLOW_TABLE, pH_inflow, TA_inflow, DIC_inflow, DOC_inflow)

SurfaceArea <- 22.5 * 22.5

Data <- pHSlope2 |>
  ungroup() |>
  filter(!TANK_NUM %in% c("Inflow1", "Inflow2")) |>
  mutate(TANK_NUM = as.numeric(TANK_NUM)) |>
  left_join(TableID |> select(TANK_NUM, INFLOW_TABLE), by = "TANK_NUM") |>
  left_join(InflowData, by = c("DATE", "TIME", "INFLOW_TABLE")) |>
  mutate(
    DATETIME       = ymd_hms(paste(DATE, TIME)),
    deltapH        = pH - pH_inflow,
    deltaDOC       = NPOC_uM - DOC_inflow,
    totalflow      = FLOW_RIGHT + FLOW_LEFT,
    residence_time = (1 / totalflow) * (10000 / 60),
    flowrate       = totalflow / 60,
    deltaTA        = TA_inflow - TA,
    deltaDIC       = DIC_inflow - DIC_umol_kg,
    NEC = (deltaTA / 2) * 1.025 * 10 * (1 / residence_time) * (1 / SurfaceArea),
    NEP = (deltaDIC * 1.025 * 10 * (1 / residence_time) * (1 / SurfaceArea)) - NEC
  )

treatment_levels <- c("Control", "Algae_Dom", "Coral_Dom", "Rubble_Dom")

chem_reframe_DAY_clean <- Data |>
  filter(TIME == hms::as_hms("12:00:00")) |>
  group_by(TREATMENT, DATE, TANK_NUM) |>
  select(DATE, TIME, TANK_NUM, TREATMENT,
         TA, pH, DIC_umol_kg, NPOC_uM, deltapH, deltaTA, deltaDOC, deltaDIC, NEC, NEP) |>
  rename(DOC = NPOC_uM) |>
  mutate(
    deltaDIC    = ifelse(deltaDIC < -250,   NA, deltaDIC),
    deltaDOC    = ifelse(deltaDOC > 200,    NA, deltaDOC),
    deltaTA     = ifelse(deltaTA < -400,    NA, deltaTA),
    DIC_umol_kg = ifelse(DIC_umol_kg > 2250, NA, DIC_umol_kg),
    DOC         = ifelse(DOC > 350,         NA, DOC),
    NEC         = ifelse(NEC < -2,          NA, NEC),
    NEC         = ifelse(TREATMENT == "Rubble_Dom" & NEC > 2, NA, NEC),
    NEP         = ifelse(NEP < -2.1,        NA, NEP),
    NEP         = ifelse(NEP > 5,           NA, NEP),
    pH          = ifelse(pH < 7.8,          NA, pH),
    TA          = ifelse(TA > 2700,         NA, TA)
  )
```

---

# Tank-level path analysis {#sec-path}

> **Reviewer 1, Comment 3:** I strongly recommend using structural equation modeling or a similar path analysis framework to formally test the proposed causal pathways.
>
> **Reviewer 2, Comment 4:** Consider using a formal framework (e.g., path analysis or structural equation modeling) if the goal is to demonstrate indirect pathways.

## Data preparation

Tank-level means are used as the unit of analysis (n = 16 independent tanks), avoiding within-tank pseudoreplication. All continuous variables are z-scored for standardized path coefficients.

::: {.callout-note}
All chemistry variables (NCP, pH, DOC) are computed from **daytime (12:00) measurements only** using the seacarb carbonate chemistry pipeline, and the same outlier filters applied throughout the analysis. An alternative pre-computed summary file (`Raw_Chem_Data.csv`) exists that averages both day and night time points without outlier filtering; the two sources yield pH values that differ by up to 0.09 units (r = 0.76) and DOC values that correlate at only r = 0.44. The daytime-only pipeline values are used here to maintain consistency with how NCP is measured (daytime flux) and how the physiological measurements were interpreted.
:::

```{r prep-tank-data}
#| label: prep-tank-data

# Tank-level daytime means for NCP, pH, DOC — consistent with NCP measurement timing
tank_chem <- chem_reframe_DAY_clean |>
  group_by(TREATMENT, TANK_NUM) |>
  summarize(
    NEP_mean = mean(NEP, na.rm = TRUE),
    pH_mean  = mean(pH,  na.rm = TRUE),
    DOC_mean = mean(DOC, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups  = "drop"
  ) |>
  drop_na() |>
  mutate(TREATMENT = factor(TREATMENT, levels = treatment_levels))

# Tank-level physiology means
tank_physio <- metadata |>
  group_by(TANK_NUM, TREATMENT) |>
  summarize(
    mean_chla    = mean(chla_ug_cm2,        na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_endo    = mean(endo_per_cm2,        na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_biomass = mean(mean_tissue_biomass, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_GP      = mean(GP,                 na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_R       = mean(R,                  na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups      = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(TREATMENT = factor(TREATMENT, levels = treatment_levels))

tank_full <- tank_physio |>
  mutate(
    log_chla    = log(mean_chla),
    log_endo    = log(mean_endo),
    log_biomass = log(mean_biomass)
  )

# Join chemistry and physiology; z-score all continuous variables
tank_path_data <- tank_chem |>
  mutate(TANK_NUM = as.numeric(TANK_NUM)) |>
  left_join(
    tank_full |> select(TANK_NUM, log_chla, log_endo, log_biomass, mean_GP, mean_R),
    by = "TANK_NUM"
  ) |>
  mutate(across(c(NEP_mean, pH_mean, DOC_mean,
                  log_chla, log_endo, log_biomass, mean_GP, mean_R), scale)) |>
  drop_na()

cat("n tanks in path model:", nrow(tank_path_data), "\n")
cat("pH range (pipeline daytime):", round(diff(range(tank_chem$pH_mean, na.rm = TRUE)), 4), "units\n")
cat("DOC range (pipeline daytime):", round(diff(range(tank_chem$DOC_mean, na.rm = TRUE)), 1), "µmol/L\n")
```

## Path model

Path coefficients are labeled (c, d, e, f) to enable indirect effect computation via the delta method.

```{r tank-path-model}
#| label: tank-path-model

tank_path_model <- "
  # NCP → pH (c1) and DOC (d1)
  pH_mean  ~ c1*NEP_mean
  DOC_mean ~ d1*NEP_mean

  # pH (e1) and DOC (e2) → Chl-a
  log_chla ~ e1*pH_mean + e2*DOC_mean

  # Chl-a → downstream physiology (f1–f4)
  log_endo    ~ f1*log_chla
  mean_GP     ~ f2*log_chla
  mean_R      ~ f3*log_chla
  log_biomass ~ f4*log_chla

  # Residual covariance between pH and DOC after accounting for NCP
  pH_mean ~~ DOC_mean

  # --- Indirect effects ---

  # NCP → pH/DOC → Chl-a (two-step)
  ind_NCP_pH_Chla     := c1 * e1
  ind_NCP_DOC_Chla    := d1 * e2
  ind_NCP_total_Chla  := (c1 * e1) + (d1 * e2)

  # pH → Chl-a → downstream (two-step)
  ind_pH_Chla_Endo    := e1 * f1
  ind_pH_Chla_GP      := e1 * f2
  ind_pH_Chla_R       := e1 * f3
  ind_pH_Chla_Biomass := e1 * f4

  # DOC → Chl-a → downstream (two-step)
  ind_DOC_Chla_Endo    := e2 * f1
  ind_DOC_Chla_GP      := e2 * f2
  ind_DOC_Chla_R       := e2 * f3
  ind_DOC_Chla_Biomass := e2 * f4

  # NCP → pH → Chl-a → downstream (three-step via pH)
  ind_NCP_pH_Endo     := c1 * e1 * f1
  ind_NCP_pH_GP       := c1 * e1 * f2
  ind_NCP_pH_R        := c1 * e1 * f3
  ind_NCP_pH_Biomass  := c1 * e1 * f4

  # NCP → DOC → Chl-a → downstream (three-step via DOC)
  ind_NCP_DOC_Endo    := d1 * e2 * f1
  ind_NCP_DOC_GP      := d1 * e2 * f2
  ind_NCP_DOC_R       := d1 * e2 * f3
  ind_NCP_DOC_Biomass := d1 * e2 * f4
"

tank_path_fit <- sem(
  tank_path_model,
  data      = as.data.frame(tank_path_data),
  estimator = "ML"
)
cat("Converged:", lavInspect(tank_path_fit, "converged"), "\n")
```

## Direct path coefficients

```{r tank-path-direct}
#| label: tank-path-direct

tank_path_coefs <- parameterEstimates(tank_path_fit, standardized = TRUE) |>
  filter(op == "~") |>
  select(lhs, rhs, est, se, z, pvalue, std.all) |>
  mutate(
    lhs = recode(lhs,
      NEP_mean    = "NCP",
      pH_mean     = "pH",
      DOC_mean    = "DOC",
      log_chla    = "Chl-a (log)",
      log_endo    = "Endosymbiont (log)",
      mean_GP     = "Gross photosynthesis",
      mean_R      = "Respiration",
      log_biomass = "Tissue biomass (log)"
    ),
    rhs = recode(rhs,
      NEP_mean = "NCP",
      pH_mean  = "pH",
      DOC_mean = "DOC",
      log_chla = "Chl-a (log)"
    ),
    across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4))
  )

tank_path_coefs |>
  kbl(
    caption = paste0(
      "Direct path coefficients from the tank-level SEM (n = ",
      nrow(tank_path_data), " tanks). All variables z-scored. ",
      "Green = p < 0.05; yellow = 0.05 ≤ p < 0.10."
    ),
    col.names = c("Response", "Predictor", "Estimate", "SE", "z", "p", "Std. β")
  ) |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE) |>
  row_spec(which(tank_path_coefs$pvalue < 0.05),  background = "#d4edda") |>
  row_spec(which(tank_path_coefs$pvalue >= 0.05 & tank_path_coefs$pvalue < 0.10),
           background = "#fff3cd")
```

## Path diagram

```{r path-diagram}
#| label: path-diagram
#| fig-cap: "Path diagram summarizing direct paths in the tank-level SEM (means model). Green = p < 0.05; grey = n.s. Numbers are standardized path coefficients (β). n = 16 tanks."
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 4.5

library(purrr)

# Node positions
path_nodes <- tibble(
  id    = c("NCP",  "pH",  "DOC",  "Chla",  "Endo",                 "GP",                   "R",           "Bio"),
  label = c("NCP",  "pH",  "DOC",  "Chl-a", "Endosymbiont\ndensity","Gross\nphotosynthesis", "Respiration", "Tissue\nbiomass"),
  x     = c(1,      3,     3,      5,        7,                       7,                       7,             7),
  y     = c(0,      0.8,  -0.8,    0,        1.8,                     0.6,                    -0.6,          -1.8)
)

# Direct path results from model
path_edges <- tibble(
  from = c("NCP", "NCP", "pH",   "DOC",  "Chla", "Chla", "Chla", "Chla"),
  to   = c("pH",  "DOC", "Chla", "Chla", "Endo", "GP",   "R",    "Bio"),
  coef = c(0.651, 0.180, 0.564, -0.286,  0.522,  0.263,  0.642,  0.510),
  sig  = c(TRUE,  FALSE, TRUE,   FALSE,   TRUE,   FALSE,  TRUE,   TRUE)
) |>
  left_join(path_nodes |> select(id, x, y), by = c("from" = "id")) |>
  rename(x0 = x, y0 = y) |>
  left_join(path_nodes |> select(id, x, y), by = c("to" = "id")) |>
  rename(x1 = x, y1 = y)

shorten_arrow <- function(x0, y0, x1, y1, d_start = 0.5, d_end = 0.5) {
  dx <- x1 - x0; dy <- y1 - y0; d <- sqrt(dx^2 + dy^2)
  tibble(xs = x0 + dx/d*d_start, ys = y0 + dy/d*d_start,
         xe = x1 - dx/d*d_end,   ye = y1 - dy/d*d_end,
         mx = (x0 + dx/d*d_start + x1 - dx/d*d_end) / 2,
         my = (y0 + dy/d*d_start + y1 - dy/d*d_end) / 2)
}

edge_coords <- pmap_dfr(path_edges, function(from, to, coef, sig, x0, y0, x1, y1) {
  pts <- shorten_arrow(x0, y0, x1, y1)
  tibble(from, to, coef, sig,
         xs = pts$xs, ys = pts$ys, xe = pts$xe, ye = pts$ye,
         mx = pts$mx, my = pts$my)
})

ggplot() +
  geom_segment(
    data = edge_coords,
    aes(x = xs, y = ys, xend = xe, yend = ye, color = sig),
    linewidth = 0.9,
    arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.22, "cm"), type = "closed"),
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_label(
    data = edge_coords,
    aes(x = mx, y = my, label = sprintf("%.2f", coef), color = sig),
    size = 2.8, label.padding = unit(0.12, "lines"), label.size = 0,
    fill = "white", show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_tile(
    data = path_nodes,
    aes(x = x, y = y),
    width = 0.9, height = 0.42,
    fill = "white", color = "grey35", linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = path_nodes,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
    size = 2.9, lineheight = 0.9
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#2ca25f", "FALSE" = "grey60")) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.3, y = -2.5,
           label = "Green = p < 0.05   Grey = n.s.   Coefficients are standardized (\u03b2)",
           hjust = 0, size = 2.8, color = "grey30") +
  coord_equal(xlim = c(0.3, 7.7), ylim = c(-2.6, 2.2), expand = FALSE) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(8, 8, 8, 8))
```

## Indirect effects

```{r tank-indirect}
#| label: tank-indirect

indirect_raw <- parameterEstimates(tank_path_fit, standardized = TRUE) |>
  filter(op == ":=") |>
  select(label, est, se, z, pvalue, std.all) |>
  mutate(
    Pathway = recode(label,
      ind_NCP_pH_Chla      = "NCP → pH → Chl-a",
      ind_NCP_DOC_Chla     = "NCP → DOC → Chl-a",
      ind_NCP_total_Chla   = "NCP → [pH + DOC] → Chl-a  (total)",
      ind_pH_Chla_Endo     = "pH → Chl-a → Endosymbiont",
      ind_pH_Chla_GP       = "pH → Chl-a → Gross photosynthesis",
      ind_pH_Chla_R        = "pH → Chl-a → Respiration",
      ind_pH_Chla_Biomass  = "pH → Chl-a → Tissue biomass",
      ind_DOC_Chla_Endo    = "DOC → Chl-a → Endosymbiont",
      ind_DOC_Chla_GP      = "DOC → Chl-a → Gross photosynthesis",
      ind_DOC_Chla_R       = "DOC → Chl-a → Respiration",
      ind_DOC_Chla_Biomass = "DOC → Chl-a → Tissue biomass",
      ind_NCP_pH_Endo      = "NCP → pH → Chl-a → Endosymbiont",
      ind_NCP_pH_GP        = "NCP → pH → Chl-a → Gross photosynthesis",
      ind_NCP_pH_R         = "NCP → pH → Chl-a → Respiration",
      ind_NCP_pH_Biomass   = "NCP → pH → Chl-a → Tissue biomass",
      ind_NCP_DOC_Endo     = "NCP → DOC → Chl-a → Endosymbiont",
      ind_NCP_DOC_GP       = "NCP → DOC → Chl-a → Gross photosynthesis",
      ind_NCP_DOC_R        = "NCP → DOC → Chl-a → Respiration",
      ind_NCP_DOC_Biomass  = "NCP → DOC → Chl-a → Tissue biomass"
    ),
    across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)),
    Chain = case_when(
      grepl("^NCP → \\[", Pathway) ~ "NCP → Chl-a (total)",
      grepl("^NCP → pH → Chl-a$", Pathway) ~ "NCP → Chl-a (total)",
      grepl("^NCP → DOC → Chl-a$", Pathway) ~ "NCP → Chl-a (total)",
      grepl("^NCP → pH → Chl-a →", Pathway) ~ "NCP → pH → Chl-a → downstream",
      grepl("^NCP → DOC → Chl-a →", Pathway) ~ "NCP → DOC → Chl-a → downstream",
      grepl("^pH", Pathway) ~ "pH → Chl-a → downstream",
      grepl("^DOC", Pathway) ~ "DOC → Chl-a → downstream",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  ) |>
  arrange(Chain, desc(abs(est)))

indirect_raw |>
  select(Chain, Pathway, est, se, z, pvalue, std.all) |>
  kbl(
    caption = paste0(
      "Indirect (mediated) effects from the tank-level SEM. ",
      "Estimates are products of the relevant direct path coefficients; ",
      "SEs are from the delta method. ",
      "Green = p < 0.05; yellow = 0.05 ≤ p < 0.10."
    ),
    col.names = c("Chain group", "Pathway", "Estimate", "SE", "z", "p", "Std. β")
  ) |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE) |>
  collapse_rows(columns = 1, valign = "top") |>
  row_spec(which(indirect_raw$pvalue < 0.05),  background = "#d4edda") |>
  row_spec(which(indirect_raw$pvalue >= 0.05 & indirect_raw$pvalue < 0.10),
           background = "#fff3cd")
```

## Data visualization

```{r fig-model1}
#| label: fig-model1
#| fig-cap: "Bivariate relationships for the significant paths in Model 1 (means). Points are tank-level means (n = 16) colored by community treatment. Regression line and R²/p-value are pooled across treatments. Note: bivariate R² will generally be smaller than path model partial coefficients because it does not condition on other variables in the model."
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 8

library(ggpubr)
library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)

treat_colors <- c("Control" = "#4682B4", "Algae_Dom" = "#2E8B57",
                  "Coral_Dom" = "#E07B54", "Rubble_Dom" = "#A07850")
treat_labels <- c("Control" = "Control", "Algae_Dom" = "Macroalgae",
                  "Coral_Dom" = "Coral",  "Rubble_Dom" = "CCA")
```
